rationale: Weekly long run — aerobic base. Home profile, full readiness, no niggles. Cardio cap and hard/easy spacing both OK.

warmup.cue: Build pace gradually for the first kilometre.

main.cue: Aerobic only — finish feeling you could go further.

cooldown.cue: Settle the breath, drop the pace.
Sit tall, rotate the hips side to side.
